title: Track C run file
description: Input to pipeline/run.py. extracted_claims = beliefs pulled by the Stage-1 gate, with timestamps and validity. gold_contradictions / evolution_pairs = human labels used to score.

gold_contradictions.description: Human-labeled pairs that genuinely conflict at overlapping times. Format: [[id,id], ...].

evolution_pairs.description: Human-labeled pairs where the same belief legitimately CHANGED over time (must NOT be flagged). Format: [[id,id], ...].

subject.description: Stable dotted topic key; same topic across sessions MUST share this key.

stance.description: Canonical position label; same position -> same string.

timestamp.description: Monotonic order; session-1 claims < session-3 claims.

is_belief.description: Human audit: true = genuine stable belief; false = noise the gate should have dropped (counts against BEP).
